---
title: "Team"
---

## Members
- Giovanna Alves — data cleaning, EDA, modeling, writing
- Prakriti Dhungana — writing, researcher, editor
- Adeline John — writing, researcher, editor 
- Kyubin Oh — writing, researcher, editor

## Collaboration rules (simple)
- Pull before you start work.
- Commit small changes with clear messages.
- Only one person edits the *same* `.qmd` file at a time.
- Use Issues (optional) for tasks/bugs.
